docket_entries.description: DISMISSAL OF ENTIRE ACTION OF ALL PARTIES AND ALL CAUSES OF ACTION WITHOUT PREJUDICE (TRANSACTION ID # 60893368)

A CALIFORNIA LIMITED LIABILITY COMPANY AS TO DEFENDANT GONZALES, MARIA ELENA DOES 1 TO 10 SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE SCHEDULED FOR MAY-03-2017 PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  JAN-30-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT STATEMENT DUE ON         APR-10-2017

ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR JUL-25-2017 IN DEPARTMENT 610 AT 10:30 AM FOR FAILURE TO FILE PROOF OF SERVICE ON DEFENDANT(S) AND OBTAIN ANSWER(S), OR ENTER DEFAULT(S). THE JUN-14-2017 CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE IS OFF CALENDAR. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE OF JUL-25-2017 IS OFF CALENDAR. DISMISSAL ON FILE. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
